channel.title: Fetching and displaying WP widgets/sidebars
channel.description:
Hello,
I only recently found Frontity and have been messing around with it since and now I'm here.
I've been trying to fetch and display the WP widgets/sidebars on my frontity theme, but I haven't really gotten anywhere. I've done some googling on this subject but haven't been able to find any specific answer, just some forum posts about it being in development or being looked into but that was from a year or two ago.
I have a feeling you need some kind of handler to populate something with some data, or?
Does anyone have a solution to this? Any pin-pointers?
The reason I'm looking into doing this is to have a dynamic footer with data created in the WP backend. I could hardcode the footer, but it's not really the best solution from a client's point of view.
Thanks in advance

item.title: Fetching and displaying WP widgets/sidebars
item.dc:creator: mazfer89
item.description:
Hello,

I only recently found Frontity and have been messing around with it since and now I’m here.

I’ve been trying to fetch and display the WP widgets/sidebars on my frontity theme, but I haven’t really gotten anywhere. I’ve done some googling on this subject but haven’t been able to find any specific answer, just some forum posts about it being in development or being looked into but that was from a year or two ago.

I have a feeling you need some kind of handler to populate something with some data, or?

Does anyone have a solution to this? Any pin-pointers?

The reason I’m looking into doing this is to have a dynamic footer with data created in the WP backend. I could hardcode the footer, but it’s not really the best solution from a client’s point of view.

Thanks in advance

Read full topic
